headline: McDonald's People Strategy In Focus As Chief People Officer Addresses CXO Summit
summary: McDonald's Chief People Officer is set to deliver the opening keynote at The CXO Summit. The event will bring together more than 500 enterprise leaders to discuss leadership and human capital topics. The keynote places McDonald's at the center of conversations on people strategy and executive priorities. For investors tracking NYSE:MCD, this keynote appearance comes as the stock trades around $279.2. The share price performance has been mixed, with the stock down 7.9% year to date and down...
